scenario.key_phrase: My parents want me to start immediately

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hello! Namaste, main Priya bol rahi hun PhysicsWallah sales team se. Aap kaise hain?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Hi, main bhi Priya hun! Main theek hun, thank you. Actually maine aapke courses ke baare mein inquire kiya tha.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Oh wonderful! Same name, how nice. Haan bilkul, main aapki help kar sakti hun. Pehle ye bataiye, aap currently kaunsi class mein hain?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Main abhi Class 12 mein hun, Kolkata se hun.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Great! Kolkata se, very nice. Aur aapka target exam kya hai - JEE ya NEET?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: JEE Advanced ka plan hai. Actually main quite serious hun about it.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect! JEE Advanced - that's excellent. Aur kitne months left hain aapke exam mein approximately?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Sirf 3 months left hain. I know it's quite less time, but I want to give my best shot.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Haan, 3 months intensive preparation ke liye perfect hai! Abhi bhi time hai agar focused approach ho. Parents bhi aware hain aapke plans ke baare mein?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Haan bilkul, actually my parents want me to start immediately. They're quite supportive.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: That's wonderful support! Kya parents abhi nearby hain? Main unse bhi baat kar sakti hun if needed. Aur budget ke liye koi specific range mind mein hai?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Papa yahan hain actually. Budget ke liye no major concern hai, but obviously value for money chahiye na.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul samjha! Value for money toh PW ka forte hai. For JEE Advanced with 3 months intensive prep, main suggest karungi JEE Lakshya 2027 - comprehensive course with live classes, doubt solving, test series.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Sounds good. What's the fee structure? Aur kya included hota hai exactly?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: JEE Lakshya 2027 is ₹35,999. Includes live interactive classes, recorded lectures, study material, test series, doubt clearing sessions. EMI option bhi hai - ₹3,499 per month through PW Pay at 0% interest.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: That sounds reasonable. Papa wants to know about the success rate and faculty quality.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Great question! PW ke faculty experts hain like Alakh Sir himself, and our JEE results speak for themselves - thousands of students crack JEE every year. Live doubt sessions mein direct interaction milti hai teachers se.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Papa is asking if there's any trial or demo available? We want to see the teaching quality first.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Absolutely! Demo classes available hain. Aap 2-3 demo lectures attend kar sakte hain before final decision. Quality check karne ke liye ye best way hai.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Perfect! How do we proceed with the demo? Aur agar we're satisfied, then enrollment process kya hai?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Main aapko demo link share kar dungi after this call. Enrollment ke liye online payment gateway hai, ya PW Pay EMI option. Document sirf basic details chahiye - name, contact, class details.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Sounds very straightforward. My parents are convinced about the EMI option. When can we start the demo classes?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Demo classes aap kal se hi start kar sakte hain! Main abhi aapka registration kar deti hun demo ke liye, aur enrollment link bhi send kar dungi. Ready to proceed?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes, absolutely! We're ready to start. Please go ahead with the demo registration.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Excellent! Welcome to PW family, Priya! Main aapko WhatsApp pe demo links aur enrollment details send kar rahi hun. All the best for your JEE preparation!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Thank you so much! Really excited to start. Thanks for explaining everything so clearly.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: My pleasure! Aap demo attend kariye, and any doubts ho toh directly call kar sakte hain. Best of luck, and see you in PW classes soon!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Definitely will do! Thanks again Priya. Have a great day!

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: You too! Take care and happy learning with PhysicsWallah!
